description: Queries the current state of the geofence map: obstacle count, whether warehouse contours are loaded, and contour geometry counts. Used as a health check before navigation.

out.name: obstacle_count
out.description: Number of obstacles currently in the spatial index

out.name: contours_loaded
out.description: True if warehouse boundary contours have been loaded

out.name: contour_segment_count
out.description: Number of outer wall line segments

out.name: inner_polygon_count
out.description: Number of inner contour polygons (pillars, shelves)
